title: Add Antigravity Sessions navigation and view
description: Add an 'Antigravity Sessions' navigation button that opens a scrollable list view of all available antigravity sessions located in '.gemini/antigravity-cli/brain/'. Clicking a session must automatically check the 'continue conversation' box and pass the selected session ID to run_antigravity.sh (which will execute 'agy_va39 --conversation <session-id>' instead of '-c'). The selected session ID must be passed on every subsequent invocation as long as the continue box remains checked.
result: Implemented sessions lists retrieved via Termux command in right drawer ListView, and added session parameter to run_antigravity.sh.
